title: Fly Zapper Electric, 3500V Solar Fly Killer, LED 2 IN 1 UV Light Insect Bug Zapper, 360° Hangable Mosquito Control for Indoor Outdoor, USB Mosquito Killer Lamp Removable Washable Tray
features: NEW UPGRADED SOLAR FLY ZAPPER: Dnenellr Solar Electric fly zapper consists of a 10 W UV light that attracts almost all flying insects through a special wavelength, and a 3500 V high-voltage grid that captures and electrocutes the flying insects, perfect for indoor and outdoor use. Effective area up to 1,000 square feet

2-IN-1 CHARGING METHOD: Our solar fly killer is fully upgraded, it can be charged with solar energy as well as via USB, smarter, efficient, power saving, also portable, very convenient for outdoor camping

IPX5 WATERPROOF & DURABLE: Our mosquito killer is made of high temperature resistant ABS material. The unique screw cap design supports IPX5 waterproof function. It can be hung on treetops, eaves, walls, suitable for indoor and outdoor use, no need to worry about rainwater damaging the mosquito killer light, ideal for outdoor harsh weather conditions

3 IN 1 UV LAMP AND WHITE LIGHT: Our fly zapper electric can be used multi-functionally, it can be used as mosquito killer lamp to kill all kinds of mosquitoes efficiently and quickly; it can also be used as indoor and outdoor night light and first aid light, it is the best gift for every family

360° ALL-ROUND PROTECTION,EASY TO CLEAN: Dnenellr light insect has a high quality protection mesh on the outside of the lamp, which can effectively kill mosquitoes and bugs, while avoiding accidental contact with the internal 3500 V high voltage power grid. There is a removable tray at the bottom of the mosquito killer, mosquito bodies will be collected into the tray at the bottom of the mosquito killer, use paper towel or brush to clean the removable tray, clean, dry and put it back

SAFE FOR HOMANS AND PETS: Dnenellr solar powered bug zapper has no smoke, no odor, no spray, no mess, no chemicals during use. Compared with other insecticides, our mosquito killer has a fully sealed protective net to keep small children (kids or pets) out of the device. Protect your family from insects in a safe way

WIDE APPLICATION: Our electric fly killer is suitable for all indoor environments, such as living room, bedroom, kitchen, house, garage, backyard, lawn, garden, hotel, restaurant, factory, food store, slaughterhouse warehouse, hospital, etc. It can also be used for commercial and industrial purposes. Can be used indoor or outdoor, 360° omni-directional capture all kinds of flying insects indoor and outdoor
